data.title: Binance executive Tigran Gambaryan announces his departure
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News - Binance's global financial crime compliance director and former IRS investigator Tigran Gambaryan announced his resignation, ending his four-year term. Gambaryan joined Binance in 2021 and has formed a global compliance team consisting of more than 100 former prosecutors and federal law enforcement officers.
In 2024, Gambaryan was detained by Nigeria because of Binance's business in the country, and was later released on humanitarian grounds under pressure from the United States. Although he has been cleared of charges, Nigeria continues to hold Binance accountable. He said he still hopes to continue to play a bridging role between law enforcement, technology and compliance in the future. (Coindesk)

data.title: Bitcoin and Ethereum Options Expiry Highlights Market Trends
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Greeks.Live analyst Adam shared insights on social media regarding the options expiry data for June 6. A total of 31,000 Bitcoin options expired with a Put Call Ratio of 0.71, a maximum pain point of $105,000, and a nominal value of $3.18 billion. Additionally, 241,000 Ethereum options expired with a Put Call Ratio of 0.63, a maximum pain point of $2,575, and a nominal value of $590 million.

Throughout the week, the market experienced mostly volatile conditions. A significant downturn occurred last night following the publicized conflict between U.S. President Donald Trump and Elon Musk, which led to a sharp decline in Tesla's stock, impacting both the U.S. stock market and the crypto market. The options expiry data indicates that the expiry volume was approximately 10% of the total open interest, marking a rebound after several weeks of decline. Furthermore, several large orders this week have drawn attention, indicating increased market activity.

Overall, crypto institutions have tempered expectations for Bitcoin's rapid short-term rise, with more anticipation for a moderate long-term increase.

data.title: Whales continue to increase their AAVE holdings, with total holdings reaching $69.66 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to The Data Nerd, a whale has been operating AAVE in a continuous cycle. 11 hours ago, it borrowed 5 million USDC from AAVE and transferred it to Wintermute to buy 19,608 AAVE, and then deposited all of it back to AAVE. The address currently holds a total of 280,674 AAVE (about 69.66 million US dollars) and has borrowed a total of 32.22 million USDC.

data.title: Metaplanet launches Bitcoin equity financing plan, with a target holding of 210,000 BTC
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Metaplanet CEO Simon Gerovich announced that the company has launched a special Bitcoin equity financing plan with a total scale of 770.9 billion yen (about 5.4 billion US dollars), which will be achieved through the issuance of 555 million "mobile exercise warrants". This is the first time that Japan has issued such products at a premium above the market price, thanks to Metaplanet's high volatility and liquidity.
This plan continues the successful experience of the previous "210 Million Plan", which raised 93.3 billion yen (about 650 million US dollars) in 60 trading days, achieved a BTC yield of 189%, and the stock price has risen more than three times since the announcement. The company's Bitcoin holdings have ranked tenth in the world.
Metaplanet has set a new goal this time: to hold 100,000 BTC by the end of 2026, and to increase to 210,000 by the end of 2027, accounting for 1% of the total supply of Bitcoin. Gerovich said that the company is accelerating towards a future centered on Bitcoin.

data.title: BitoPro suffers $11M cyberattack in hot wallet breach, promises full recovery
data.description:
6-6-2025 – In a major cybersecurity breach, Taiwan-based crypto exchange BitoPro has confirmed a cyberattack on 8 May, resulting in the loss of over $11 million from an outdated hot wallet. The attack was first flagged by blockchain sleuth ZachXBT, revealing once again the persistent vulnerabilities plaguing the digital asset sector. Attack targeted legacy infrastructure [.
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/bitopro-suffers-11m-cyberattack-in-hot-wallet-breach-promises-full-recovery/
